results.title: NZ sharemarket falls 0.1% on Budget Day
results.description: The New Zealand sharemarket fell slightly on Budget Day, while Mainfreight had a sharp rise even though it wasn’t happy with its annual financial result. The S&P/NZX 50 Index peaked at lunchtime at 13,310.5 but began sliding as the Budget was announced, closing at 13,206.11, down 27.10 points, or 0.16%.

results.title: Solana Price Prediction Stalls Below $90 as Pepeto Presale Passes $10M
results.description: The solana price prediction gained fresh attention after Morgan Stanley raised its SOL position to $29.9 million through Bitwise’s staking ETF. Wall Street is buying in, but SOL still trades 70% below its all time high and no analyst expects those levels back before 2027. Pepeto has raised more than $10million in presale capital, built [...] The post Solana Price Prediction Stalls Below $90 as Pepeto Presale Passes $10M appeared first on TechBullion .

results.title: InterContinental Hotels Group PLC Announces Transaction in Own Shares - May 28
results.description: LONDON, UK / ACCESS Newswire / May 28, 2026 / The Company announces that on 27 May 2026 it purchased the following number of its ordinary shares of 20340/399 pence each through Goldman Sachs International ("GSI") on the London Stock Exchange in accordance with the authority granted by shareholders at the Company's Annual General Meeting on 8 May 2025 (the "Purchase"). The Purchase was effected pursuant to instructions issued by the Company on 17 February 2026, as announced on 17 February 2026.
